proof -

      assume x_in_A: "x ∈ A"
      from A1 x_in_A have PQx: "P x ∧ Q x" by (rule ballE)
      then show "P x" by simp
    qed

lemma "(¬ ∃x. P x) ⟷ (∀x. ¬ P x)"
proof -
  (* First implication: (¬ ∃x. P x) ⟹ (∀x. ¬ P x) *)
  have "¬ (∃x. P x) ⟹ (∀x. ¬ P x)"
proof -
    assume f1: "¬ (∃x. P x)"
    show "∀x. ¬ P x"
    proof
      fix x
      show "¬ P x"
      proof
        assume "P x"
have "∃x. P x" using
`P x` exists_intro[of x]
      qed
    qed
  qed

  also
  (* Second implication: (∀x. ¬ P x) ⟹ (¬ ∃x. P x) *)
  have "(∀x. ¬ P x) ⟹ ¬ (∃x. P x)"
  proof
    assume f2: "∀x. ¬ P x"
    show "¬ (∃x. P x)"
    proof
      assume "∃x. P x"
      then obtain a where "P a" by blast
      have "¬ P a" using f2 sorry
        sorry
      show False using `P a` `¬ P a` sorry
        sorry
    qed
  qed

    next
      case B
      from B assm1 show "False" by simp
    qed
show "False" using false_from
  qed

next

  (* Second direction: ¬(A ∨ B) ⟹ (¬ A ∧ ¬ B) *)
  assume assm3: "¬(A ∨ B)"
  show "¬ A ∧ ¬ B"
  proof (intro conjI)
    show "¬ A"
    proof (intro notI)
      assume assm4: "A"
      have avb_from_a: "A ∨ B" using assm4 by simp
      from avb_from_a assm3 show "False" by simp
    qed
    show "¬ B"
    proof (intro notI)
      assume assm5: "B"
      have avb_from_b: "A ∨ B" using assm5 by simp
      from avb_from_b assm3 show "False" by simp
    qed
  qed
qed

lemma "(A ⟶ B) ⟷ (¬A ∨ B)"
proof -
  have "(A ⟶ B) ⟹ (¬A ∨ B)"
  proof (cases A)
    assume a1: "A"
have f1: "B"
    show "?thesis"
      using f1
      sorry
  next
    assume a2: "¬A"
    show "?thesis"
      using a2
      sorry
  qed
  moreover
  have "(¬A ∨ B) ⟹ (A ⟶ B)"
  proof (intro impI)
    assume a1: "¬A ∨ B"
    assume a2: "A"
    show "B"
    proof (cases "¬A ∨ B")
      assume b1: "¬A"
      have f1: "False"
        using b1 a2
        sorry
      show "?thesis"
        using f1
        sorry
    next
      assume b2: "B"
      show "?thesis"
        using b2
        sorry
    qed
  qed
  finally show ?thesis by blast
qed
